name: F2-10 E2E, Smoke, and Delivery Docs

feature.summary: Add Playwright happy-path E2E test, wire `pnpm e2e` and `pnpm smoke` scripts, update CI, refresh docs.
feature.exit_gate: `pnpm check` + `pnpm smoke` + `pnpm e2e` all pass; CI runs all three.

acceptance_criteria.text: apps/web/playwright.config.ts exists, chromium only, baseURL http://localhost:3000, webServer = pnpm dev

apps/web/e2e/phase2-board.spec.ts walks login (via cookie minted with the new `signSessionValue` export from `lib/auth/session.ts`) → list → detail → create card (via command palette) → execute → approve (if pending) → audit → SSE-driven update
apps/web/package.json has e2e, e2e:ui, smoke scripts
Root package.json forwards e2e and smoke to the web workspace
.github/workflows/web-ci.yml runs playwright install + pnpm smoke + pnpm e2e after pnpm check
docs/architecture/test_matrix.md mentions pnpm e2e and pnpm smoke in the verification gates
pnpm check remains green (existing 566 tests untouched)
pnpm e2e passes in this session, OR unavailability is documented with reason + risk

verification_matrix.expectation: exits 0, lists at least one project (chromium)
exits 0; spec file exists and is non-empty

risks.mitigation: pnpm exec playwright install chromium in CI

risks.desc: SSE-driven UI assertions can be flaky
risks.mitigation: use expect.toBeVisible with 10s timeout, no hard sleeps

risks.desc: Fixture executor outcome is not deterministic across role + card combinations
risks.mitigation: test asserts observable UI behavior, not specific state transitions

risks.desc: CI browser install may be slow / fail on macOS-arm runners
risks.mitigation: document unavailability with reason in testing/results.md

risks.desc: Adding Playwright may push CI runtime past 15-min default
risks.mitigation: single happy-path test; unit-test matrix covers details

risks.desc: Real seed data variance in fixture executor
